Video.summary: Selina recently met Lee at the mall and while their love has blossomed, she's got a serious secret - she's really a man! Then D's visits to the local pool have gotten him into hot water after sleeping with the lifeguard.
Video.title: Transsexual Takedown

Video.summary: Steven and Tekla say their daughter-in-law Jamie is their retirement fund. Then, Patricia will reveal to her mom who introduced her to hooking!
Video.title: I'm Pimping My Daughter

Video.summary: Susan is disgusted by her son Ron's incestual behavior with her niece, Tracy. But Ron insists that he is in love with Tracy and he will not let anyone get in the way of him marrying her.
Video.title: Kissin' Cousins

Video.summary: Kim and Kristie are identical twins and Kristie is planning to marry Michael but there’s a catch. Later Louis has some explaining to do. His lover of 8 years has just informed his wife of their affair!
Video.title: My Twin Slept With My Man!

Image.alt: My Twin Slept With My Man!
My Twin Slept With My Man!
My Twin Slept With My Man!

Video.summary: Shantell decided that she needs to fix her relationship with Kenneth so she's going to tell her mistress that it's over. Then Dean says that he wants to take their relationship to the next level, but Kendra's here to let Dean in on a little secret.
Video.title: Lesbian and Gay Affairs Confessed

Video.summary: Tiffany wants to escalate things with her workout partner, but he has eyes for a woman who is hiding her true identity; Sammie says he offered a woman sex instead of money when he lost a bet to her; Brianna has feelings for her pool-playing buddy.
Video.title: Sexercise Me

Video.summary: These guests say they are here to get naked and reveal their taboo sex fetishes. What could go wrong?
Video.title: Sexy Fetishes

Video.summary: Khristal's significant other does not take kindly to Billy's advances; a secret revelation puts a kibosh on April's marriage; Meghan wants to reunite with her online boyfriend, who confesses to having had an affair.
Video.title: I Paid Your Girlfriend for Sex

Image.alt: I Paid Your Girlfriend for Sex
I Paid Your Girlfriend for Sex
I Paid Your Girlfriend for Sex

Video.summary: Marco wants out of the marriage, and his affair with Chanel may be his perfect ticket out! Then Courtney's been Danny's perfect angel, but that hasn't kept him from longing for something more freaky, which he's found with the local stripper!
Video.title: My Man Slept With A Stripper!

Image.alt: My Man Slept With A Stripper!
My Man Slept With A Stripper!
My Man Slept With A Stripper!

Video.summary: Today's guests say that they are on a mission of sexual exploration. They are here to venture over to the other side and fulfill their wildest sex fantasies.
Video.title: Sex Fantasies Fulfilled

Video.summary: Jake is here because he says that he knew he was in love with his girlfriend Lindsey the first time she ever asked him for a side of cheese. Then Shaina says she's in love with not one but two beautiful girls.
Video.title: Surprise Proposals...And Punches

Video.summary: Donita says she's had a burning desire to be in porn. Today she'll tell her husband. Next David has a feeling that his girlfriend, Chastity, has been up to no good. Next Lee doesn't like his sister's chosen profession and is here to put an end to it.
Video.title: Erotic Jobs

Video.summary: Christina is a dial-a-date telephone operator and is here to confront the woman trying to steal her man!
Video.title: Battle of the Angry Women!

Video.summary: Pregnant Heather will not stand for her boyfriend's cheating, particularly since he's sleeping with his niece! Next Cindy is in a predicament: the man she loves doesn't want her anymore and another whom she doesn't love is begging to be with her!
Video.title: I'm Sleeping With My Uncle

Video.summary: Kenny hooked up with a woman who is pressing him for a relationship, but he has a surprise for her; possessive Kelsey confronts her boyfriend and the woman with whom he hooked up at a house party; Jeremy wants to end his relationship.
Video.title: I'm Gay & Sleeping With Your Nephew

Image.alt: I'm Gay & Sleeping With Your Nephew
I'm Gay & Sleeping With Your Nephew
I'm Gay & Sleeping With Your Nephew

Video.summary: Misty wants to pay for her best friend's divorce! Lucas wants a divorce due to his wife's family! See why!
Video.title: Newlyweds Headed For Divorce

Video.summary: Our cameras were at home with sisters Olivia and Catherine when Olivia confronted her older sister for sleeping with her boyfriend, Jacob. Next Jeromy has been having an affair with 2 sisters and both are now pregnant!
Video.title: Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man

Image.alt: Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man
Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man
Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man

Video.summary: Andre and Champaign’s online relationship took off, but she must admit that she’s actually a he! Shane will marry Michelle, but he’s been fulfilling his fantasy with a Dominatrix! Brandy’s wild job now involves her sister’s boyfriend!
Video.title: Trick or Treat

Video.summary: Chris claims that Brianna's very controlling and doesn't let him go out to do the things that make him happy. Then, Chad is here to propose to his girlfriend Star but before they book the caterer, Star has a little confession to make.
Video.title: Best Friend Beatdown

Video.summary: Dave says his girlfriend's constant nagging has driven him into the arms of a 72-year-old woman! Next Joe is about to tell his beautiful girlfriend that he had a one-night stand with a plus-size stripper.
Video.title: Shocking Secret Lovers

Video.summary: Glenda has been hiding two secrets from her boyfriend: She's secretly been seeing her ex and she wants to be a stripper! Then Veronica broke up with Roland when she caught him cheating. Now she's dating one of his friends and Roland wants her back.
Video.title: Secrets Come Out

Video.summary: Tom Bergeron from TV’s ‘Dancing with The Stars’ will play celebrity judge in a dance-off.
Video.title: Dancing Queen Showdown

Video.summary: Hollie fears that her husband is cheating again; Zach is running out of time to come clean to his wife about an affair he had with their neighbor; Quinton tells his fiancee about his recent fling with an old flame.
Video.title: Megabeast Unleashed

Video.summary: Lisa's husband, Mickey, moved his mistress into their house 3 months ago! Then LaTasha's boyfriend, Maurice, has been cheating with transsexual Day Day! Maurice says it's over with Day Day, but much to his surprise, LaTasha won't take him back!
Video.title: Heartless Affairs!

Video.summary: Mike is ready to end his relationship with his girlfriend because of her jealous ways; Jared admits a secret; Barry hopes to prove to an exotic dancer that he is not a typical customer and wants a chance at love.
Video.title: Fooled by a Fake Friend

Video.summary: Desiree and Kim have been dating the same man, Chango, for 6 years! Next Mark's ex-girlfriend wants him back and even lied to him and told him she was pregnant. Today she will be confronted by Mark and his new girlfriend!
Video.title: I've Had Enough…It's Over!

Video.summary: Last time, Nancy was pregnant with Versell's baby. He was cheating on her with Tara and now she’s pregnant!
Video.title: Update: Woman In Labor Confronts Mistress

Image.alt: Update: Woman In Labor Confronts Mistress
Update: Woman In Labor Confronts Mistress
Update: Woman In Labor Confronts Mistress

Video.summary: Sarah’s ready to fight to get her sister-in-law Bobbie out of her life. Guy confronts his wife’s lover Merc!
Video.title: Leave Your Lover

Video.summary: Michele forces her boyfriend to choose between her and his mistress Morgan.
Video.title: Dumped…On Springer!

Video.summary: Cousins Anthony and Brandon have been seeing each other in secret for the past year. Then, Chris is here to tell a secret to his on-again off-again girl Crystal.
Video.title: Gay Cousins In Love

Video.summary: Matt’s latest affair with Danielle’s mom’s roommate could be her mom’s breaking point! John has been experimenting with his roommate Ray behind Mahogany’s back! Rich is ready to ditch Tina for her more mature mom Shelly!
Video.title: I Want A Divorce!

Video.summary: Crystal has been sending explicit photos to her roommate's boyfriend; Kevin wants to give Jessica a dream wedding; Mario wants to confess.
Video.title: Fling Fall Outs

Video.summary: Mary needs to tell her fiancé, Bruce, that she is pregnant by a secret transsexual lover. Next Matt is here to tell his girlfriend, Julie, that he's leaving her for a transsexual. Then Amber's boyfriend is about to learn that she is really a he!
Video.title: Pregnant By A Transsexual
